full_text:
Fuluohan 扶羅韓
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Fuluohan (扶羅韓)was born in Xianbi. Passed over for succession so set up his own state. Assassinated by rival Kebineng. Fuluohan was affiliated with Xianbei. Fuluohan lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
